Accounts Office Feedback

We are committed to transparent and efficient financial services. Your feedback on fee processing, receipts, and financial support helps us serve you better. Please take a moment to rate your experience.

1. What was the primary purpose of your financial/administrative visit today? (Select one)

2. How would you rate the clarity of financial information and guidance provided? (Fee structures, payment procedures, financial policies)

3. How would you rate the following Accounts Office services?

Service / Process Excellent Good Fair Poor N/A
Fee Payment Processing
Official Receipt Issuance
Financial Clearance Processing
Bursary/Financial Aid Disbursement
Statement of Account Requests

4. How would you rate the transaction processing efficiency? (Queue times, processing speed, system responsiveness)

5. If you interacted with Accounts Office staff, how would you rate the support experience?

6. How would you rate the professionalism and attitude of Accounts Office personnel you interacted with?

7. How would you rate the accessibility and working environment of the Accounts Office?

8. How would you rate the online/digital payment and financial services?

9. Overall, how would you rate your Accounts Office experience at the university today? *

10. Please share your specific Compliments and/or Complaints to help us improve. (Your feedback matters)

Your feedback is confidential and used to improve university services.
